planner_output.reasoning_trace: The user is asking 'what is ANC?' — this is a straightforward informational question about audio technology (Active Noise Cancellation). No product search is needed; this is educational/conversational. The appropriate response_strategy is 'informational'.

final_response: Ah, the magical world of ANC! That stands for Active Noise Cancellation. Think of it as your headphones' superpower. They use microphones to pick up outside noise, and then they create sound waves that are the exact opposite to cancel it out. It’s like having a little audio ninja fighting off all those pesky distractions around you. Perfect for blocking out the hum of a busy café or the roar of an airplane engine. So, you can enjoy your tunes or podcasts without shouting at the universe! 🎧✨
